response.reasoning: Role requires 15 years experience, director-level IC, AI/ML expertise, cloud platform strategy, and demonstrated AI products. Candidate has ~14-16 years of experience (freelance from 2006, formal from ~2009-2012). Strong full-stack and polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with notable craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD). Recent role at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — relevant but brief and recent. No advanced AI degree, no recognized AI products/platforms, no evidence of director-level IC influence, no clear cloud platform strategy work at scale (some AWS CDK exposure). Entrepreneurial signal exists via GISCollective founder role. Title is 'Senior Software Developer' — below Principal/Director IC level. AI exposure is shallow relative to a Principal AI Strategy role at a major cloud provider. Score should reflect solid engineer but significant mismatch on seniority and AI depth.
strengths: Long polyglot engineering career with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial/ownership signal
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Career title tops out at Senior/Staff — no Principal/Director IC scope
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks cloud platform strategy experience or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Shallow AI/ML track record for AI Strategy role
Broad full-stack engineering depth and craftsmanship

response.justification: The candidate is a capable, versatile engineer with strong craftsmanship habits and some recent AI-adjacent work via MCP and agent tooling, plus a founder project. However, the role targets a director-level IC shaping AI/cloud strategy with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI platforms, and the résumé shows neither the seniority scope nor the depth of AI/ML product leadership required. Closer to a strong senior/staff engineer than a Principal AI strategist.
